name: Check Point SandBlast
description: Check Point SandBlast Threat Emulation and Threat Extraction API provides cloud-based or appliance-based file analysis with CPU-level exploit detection, OS-level sandbox analysis, and clean file delivery

actions.name: Query File
actions.description: Query the Threat Prevention database for existing analysis results of a file by its hash digest, without uploading the file

parameters.name: md5
parameters.description: MD5 hash of the file to query

parameters.name: sha1
parameters.description: SHA1 hash of the file to query

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to query

parameters.name: file_type
parameters.description: File extension type (e.g., pdf, exe, doc)

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of features to query: te (Threat Emulation), av (Anti-Virus), extraction (Threat Extraction)

parameters.name: te_reports
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of report formats to include: xml, pdf, tar, summary

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: JSON array of OS image objects specifying id and revision for Threat Emulation

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Upload a file to SandBlast for Threat Emulation (sandbox), Threat Extraction (CDR), and Anti-Virus scanning

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to upload for analysis (multipart form data with request JSON in 'request' part)

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: Original filename of the uploaded file

parameters.name: file_type
parameters.description: File extension type (e.g., pdf, exe, doc, xls)

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Comma-separated features: te (Threat Emulation), av (Anti-Virus), extraction (Threat Extraction)

parameters.name: te_reports
parameters.description: Comma-separated report formats: xml, pdf, tar, summary

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: JSON array of OS image objects for Threat Emulation (e.g., [{"id":"...","revision":1}])

parameters.name: extraction_method
parameters.description: Threat Extraction method: clean (remove active content) or pdf (convert to PDF)

actions.name: Download Report
actions.description: Download a Threat Emulation analysis report in the specified format (XML, PDF, or tar archive)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: File ID returned from the query or upload response

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Download type: xml_report, pdf_report, tar_report, clean_file

actions.name: Query URL
actions.description: Query SandBlast for the reputation and analysis of a specific URL

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to query for reputation and threat analysis

actions.name: Get Quota
actions.description: Retrieve the current API usage quota including remaining queries and uploads for the billing period

actions.name: Get Supported Images
actions.description: List all supported OS images (sandbox environments) available for Threat Emulation analysis
